description.pass1_value: A cloud-based platform for work management and collaboration (sheets, reports, dashboards, automation, integrations).
description.final_value: A cloud-based work management platform for planning, tracking, automating, and reporting on work (including sheets, dashboards, reports, automation, and integrations).

pass1_value.note: Smartsheet supports OAuth 2.0 (Authorization Code flow) for integrations and user-generated API Access Tokens used as Bearer tokens in the Authorization header.

final_value.note: Smartsheet API authentication uses access tokens sent as `Authorization: Bearer ...`, and it also supports OAuth 2.0 using the Authorization Code flow to obtain access tokens.

pass1_value.note: Personal API access tokens are generated from a user account (Account > Apps & Integrations > API Access). The Help Center shows how an individual user creates tokens from their account, implying self-service access for account holders. Pricing page does not indicate partner gating or paid-only restriction.

final_value.note: Smartsheet Help Center documents that users can generate a personal API access token directly from within their Smartsheet account settings (self-serve), and use it to authenticate API requests.

pass1_value.note: Public REST API docs are available and developers can self-generate an API access token or use OAuth 2.0 to start building. SDKs and examples are provided.

final_value.note: Smartsheet provides public REST API reference documentation and supports both self-generated access tokens and OAuth 2.0 for authentication, enabling developers to build integrations immediately.
